  "decision": "fail",

  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Missing check valve (flow-check) in the hydronic piping loop",
    "Uncontrolled gravity circulation (ghost flow) occurring when the pump is off"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a spring-loaded check valve or flow-control valve on the discharge side of the pump",
    "Re-test the system to ensure gravity flow is prevented when the zone pump is idle"
  ],
  "rationale": "The absence of a check valve allows hot water to migrate through the piping via natural convection (gravity flow) even when the pump is not running, leading to overheating of zones and energy waste. This violates standard hydronic piping designs and manufacturer installation manuals.",
  "references": [
    "Manufacturer Installation Manuals (Hydronic Piping Section)",
    "ASHRAE Systems and Equipment - Hydronic Heating and Cooling",
    "Standard Hydronics Reference Guides (Flow Control)"
  ]
}
